proposal1.heroHeadline: Gmail is spending thousands of hours a year on manual proposal creation. Here's the breakdown.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Creating proposals manually wastes time Gmail could use to improve email efficiency. Generate proposals in 47 seconds with our system.
proposal1.problemsIntro: These are the ongoing losses Gmail faces without automation.

problems.title: Wasted Hours
problems.description: Every hour spent crafting proposals is an hour not improving Gmail’s core services. This time bleed impacts Gmail's service advancements.

problems.title: Lost Deals
problems.description: Delayed proposals mean lost opportunities. Each day a proposal is late is a potential client choosing another email service.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: Paying staff to manually write proposals drains resources that could be better used enhancing Gmail's features.

problems.title: Inconsistency Risk
problems.description: Manual proposals risk inconsistent branding. A single off-brand proposal can hurt Gmail's reputation for being intuitive and efficient.

problems.title: Reduced Proposal Volume
problems.description: The manual process limits the number of proposals Gmail can send. Fewer proposals mean fewer chances to secure new business.

problems.title: Increased Stress
problems.description: Staff stress over proposal deadlines impacts productivity. Stressed employees are less effective in delivering Gmail's promise of efficiency.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system is the answer to these inefficiencies.

solutions.title: Instant Proposals
solutions.description: Currently, proposals take hours to complete. Our system creates them in under 60 seconds, freeing up valuable time.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Manual branding can slip through the cracks. Our AI ensures every proposal aligns with Gmail's brand, every time.

solutions.title: Automated Analysis
solutions.description: Staff currently spends time analyzing each client. Our system automates this, providing tailored content instantly.

solutions.title: Cost Efficiency
solutions.description: High labor costs for manual tasks drain resources. Our AI reduces these costs, reallocating funds to Gmail’s core innovations.

solutions.title: Stress Reduction
solutions.description: Proposal deadlines are a constant source of stress. Our system removes this pressure, improving overall employee morale.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Gmail's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Gmail around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Gmail.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Revolutionize Acme Corp's Communication with Gmail's Intuitive Email Solutions
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Engage with Gmail for efficient email management and enhanced productivity. Let's transform your communication strategy with tailored solutions.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is experiencing significant losses due to communication inefficiencies.

problems.title: High Email Bounce Rates
problems.description: Every undelivered email is a missed opportunity to engage with a potential client. This results in lost revenue and decreased brand credibility.

problems.title: Poor Spam Management
problems.description: Time wasted on sorting through spam emails is time not spent on strategic tasks, leading to decreased productivity and potential financial loss.

problems.title: Limited Storage Capacity
problems.description: Running out of storage leads to lost emails and data, which could impact decision-making and strategic planning.

problems.title: Insecure Email Communication
problems.description: Every data breach due to unsecured emails risks client trust and can result in financial penalties.

problems.title: Lack of Mobile Access
problems.description: Without mobile access, important communications are missed, leading to delayed decision-making and potential revenue loss.

problems.title: Inefficient Email Search
problems.description: Time taken to search for old emails could be better spent on tasks that drive business growth, resulting in lost productivity.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our solutions directly address these communication losses for Acme Corp.

solutions.title: Gmail's Spam Filtration
solutions.description: Reduces spam so your team can focus on important communications. Increases productivity and saves time.

solutions.title: Gmail Security Features
solutions.description: Protects your communications with advanced security. Builds trust and mitigates risk.

solutions.title: Gmail Mobile Access
solutions.description: Ensures your team stays connected anywhere. Facilitates quick decision-making.

solutions.title: Gmail Search Functionality
solutions.description: Enables quick access to past communications. Increases efficiency and reduces time loss.

metrics.label: Reduction in time spent managing emails.
